summary: Completed comprehensive testing of category-level product addition feature for interventions. All 10 backend tests passed. All 7 frontend features tested successfully. The new feature allows adding products at category level during intervention preparation, with model/variant to be specified later by the clinician.
passed_tests: Backend: Get product categories returns list with Pacemaker, Lead, Ballon, Champ 1
Backend: Get product types (models) returns list
Backend: Get product specifications (variants) returns list
Backend: Create intervention with category-level product (no product_id, only category_id)
Backend: Add product at type (model) level
Backend: Add specific product with product_id
Backend: Intervention detail enrichment returns category/type/spec names
Backend: Products module - get products with relations
Backend: Products module - get product instances
Backend: Products module - CRUD operations
Frontend: Login and navigation to /management/interventions works
Frontend: Intervention detail dialog opens when clicking a row
Frontend: Cascading columns show 'Catégorie *' (required), 'Modèle (optionnel)', 'Variante (optionnel)'
Frontend: Selecting a category shows '+ Ajouter : [catégorie] (modèle/variante à préciser)' button
Frontend: Clicking add button adds product with 'Catégorie' tag (orange) and 'Modèle/variante à préciser' badge
Frontend: 'Ou choisir un produit spécifique' link expands to show specific products list
Frontend: Specific products show Description, N° GRM, Stock columns with + button
Frontend: Products module loads correctly with all tabs (Produits, Fournisseurs, Catégories, Modèles, Variantes)
Frontend: Instances panel is read-only (no add/edit/delete buttons for instances - dead code cleanup verified)
Frontend: Product CRUD buttons (edit, delete) still work
critical_code_review_comments: enrichIntervention() in interventions.service.ts correctly resolves category/type/spec names for all InterventionProduct entries
Frontend cascading columns UI is well-implemented with clear visual hierarchy
The 'à préciser' badge provides clear visual feedback that model/variant needs to be specified later
Dead code cleanup in products.component.ts was successful - instances panel is now read-only
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test interventions: TEST-CAT-LEVEL-001, TEST-TYPE-LEVEL-001, TEST-SPECIFIC-001
context_for_next_testing_agent: Category-level product addition feature is fully functional. The intervention detail dialog shows cascading columns for Catégorie/Modèle/Variante. Products can be added at category level (orange 'Catégorie' tag with 'Modèle/variante à préciser' badge) or as specific products (blue 'Produit' tag). The Products module instances panel is now read-only after dead code cleanup. All backend APIs for intervention products support category_id, type_id, specification_id fields.

category_level_product_addition.description: Add products at category level during intervention preparation

products_module_cleanup.description: Dead code cleanup - instances panel is now read-only
